forecast-period.text: Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
High

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the morning then tending north to northeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h tending northeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending north to northeasterly in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
No Rating
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the south early this morning. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly during the day then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending north to northeasterly in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 30.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming northerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then turning northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 24 to 29.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 30 to 45 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 32.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, high chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Becoming cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 34.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h shifting southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Woomera, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.
Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 26 to 31.
Moderate
Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Yunta, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 32.
